vllm.title: TP/quantization/weight loading refactor part 2 - Refactor quantized linear logic and extend quantization support to all models
vllm.author: zhuohan123
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Refactor the tensor parallelism, quantization, and weight-loading codes.
Summary of the new features enabled by this PR:

All models are able to be quantized with AWQ and SqueezeLLM, and soon GPTQ.
Model loading code became much simpler.
Support model parallelism for all MQA/GQA models when the numb
